title: Forge --json envelope (C3)
description: The single machine-readable shape every command emits via manager/lib/json-out.mjs. `ok` is computed (summary.errors === 0 and no failed/errored child); `data` is the only command-specific part; `findings`/`summary` are uniform. Owned by Bundle F (ADR-0004, BR-CLI-004). See docs/manager/spec/SPEC-09-data-model.md §The --json envelope (C3).

command.description: The invoked command or command group.

ok.description: Computed success: summary.errors === 0 and no failed/errored child.

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the envelope was produced.

data.description: Command-specific payload; the only non-uniform part of the envelope.

findings.description: The uniform finding list (C2). Each item is the unified finding shape.

summary.description: Roll-up counts; `errors`/`warnings`/`info` are uniform, plus optional command-specific counts.
